title: Watering Overlay
description: Help you in your farming exploits to see what crops are out of range of water, or to plan out your farms!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34fc2535eaa9b45358fac2991f6a31d0072ef51b.png)
## See where water can reach crops!
Very useless mod,</br>
But for those who live the agriculture life,</br>
This is somewhat useful to when building non-uniform farms, my favorite activity

P.S. Feel free to ask for a port to a modloader or minecraft version on the git!
